ground_truth.title: Ninja Professional Plus 72-Oz Kitchen System Blender, Smoothies, Crush, 5 Auto-iQ Preset Programs, 1400PW, BN800 Silver
ground_truth.main_content:
Modern Design: Features a new modern design and enhanced functionality compared to Ninja's original Professional Kitchen System (BL770).

Powerful Crushing: Equipped with Ninja Total Crushing Blades and 1400 peak watts of professional power for perfectly crushed ice in smoothies and frozen drinks.

Large Capacity: Includes a 72 oz. Total Crushing Pitcher (64 oz. max liquid capacity) ideal for preparing large batches for families.

Portable Convenience: Comes with a single-serve cup and spout lid, facilitating easy transport of nutrient-rich smoothies.

Versatile Processing: Features a 64 oz. Precision Processor Bowl for even chopping, smooth purees, and processing up to 2 lbs. of dough.

Intelligent Programs: Offers 5 Auto-iQ preset programs for smoothies, frozen drinks, nutrient extractions, chopped mixtures, and dough preparation.

Specs

Watts: 1200 W
Volume capacity: 72 oz
Blade material: Stainless Steel
Speeds: 5
